disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest feels tight and 'like it's exploding', constant for about two days, coming on a couple of days after a major work promotion
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your chest feels like?
When did the chest tightness start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels really tight, like it's about to explode. It's been like this for two days, ever since a couple of days after I got the promotion.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heart pounding and racing; a smartwatch shows a rate around 110 that will not come down
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to check your pulse or heart rate?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing — my watch says it's around 110 and it just won't slow down no matter what I do.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sleep at all for about 48 hours, intensely agitated, trembling, sweaty, unable to settle
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't slept at all in two days. I'm shaking, sweaty, and I just can't switch off — I feel like something bad is about to happen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest sensation is not a crushing pain and does not spread to the jaw or arm; breathing feels normal and a smartwatch oxygen reading is 99%
trigger_question_examples: Is the chest feeling a crushing pain, and does it spread to your jaw, shoulder or arm?
Are you short of breath, and can you check your oxygen level?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more of a tightness than a crushing pain, and it doesn't really spread anywhere. My breathing feels okay actually and my watch says my oxygen is 99%.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Describes the trigger as a positive event (a promotion), with intense guilt about outperforming peers from a similar background, fear of losing it, and feeling like a fraud
trigger_question_examples: Has anything happened recently that this seems connected to?
What was going through your mind when this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's stupid — this all started right after I got promoted, something I worked years for. But I feel so guilty that I made it out when people I came up with didn't, and I'm terrified it'll all be taken away and everyone will realise I'm a fraud.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: When sensitively asked, denies any thoughts of self-harm or ending life; describes fear and exhaustion rather than a wish to die
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this overwhelmed they have thoughts of harming themselves — is that happening for you?
Are you having any thoughts of not wanting to be here?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I don't want to hurt myself or anything like that. I'm just terrified and completely wired and I can't calm down.
